briefs.title: Council to vote on $1.3M traffic control contract with The Universal Group
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on awarding a one-year contract worth up to $1,300,000 (including taxes) to The Universal Group for flagging and traffic control services, with the option to renew for up to four more years.
briefs.action_required: If you provide traffic control services, watch for the council decision — this contract affects who gets city work.
